generated_oml:
instance HokuyoUST10LXLiDAR : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Hokuyo UST-10LX LiDAR sensor providing point cloud data for environmental perception"
    DTDFVocab:producedData HokuyoPointCloudDataTransmitted
]

instance IntelDeepsenseD435iDepthCamera : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Intel Deepsense D435i Depth Camera providing visual data for object detection"
    DTDFVocab:producedData IntelDepthCameraVisualDataTransmitted
]

instance VehicleSpeedSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Vehicle speed sensor measuring current speed via wheel encoder"
    DTDFVocab:producedData VehicleSpeedDataTransmitted
]

instance SteeringAngleSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Steering angle sensor measuring steering wheel position"
    DTDFVocab:producedData SteeringAngleDataTransmitted
]

instance HokuyoPointCloudDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom HokuyoUST10LXLiDAR
]

instance IntelDepthCameraVisualDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom IntelDeepsenseD435iDepthCamera
]

instance VehicleSpeedDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom VehicleSpeedSensor
]

instance SteeringAngleDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SteeringAngleSensor
]

instance ObjectDetectionEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "ROS2 package for object detection using depth camera"
    DTDFVocab:enables ComputationOffloadingService
]

instance HokuyoPointCloudData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Raw point cloud data from Hokuyo UST-10LX LiDAR sensor"
    DTDFVocab:fromData HokuyoPointCloudDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DBSCANProcessingEnabler
]

instance IntelDepthCameraVisualData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Visual data from Intel Deepsense D435i Depth Camera"
    DTDFVocab:fromData IntelDepthCameraVisualDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ObjectDetectionEnabler
]

instance VehicleSpeedData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Ego vehicle speed data"
    DTDFVocab:fromData VehicleSpeedDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ACCControlEnabler
]

instance SteeringAngleData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Steering angle data"
    DTDFVocab:fromData SteeringAngleDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ACCControlEnabler
]

instance ObjectClustersData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Clustering results from DBSCAN processing of point cloud data"
    DTDFVocab:fromData HokuyoPointCloudDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo KalmanFilterEnabler
]

instance ObjectTracksData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Tracked object positions and velocities"
    DTDFVocab:fromData HokuyoPointCloudDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ACCControlEnabler
]

instance VehicleStateData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Combined vehicle speed and steering angle parameters"
    DTDFVocab:fromData VehicleSpeedDataTransmitted, SteeringAngleDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataMonitoringEnabler
]

instance DBSCANModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "DBSCAN algorithm for point cloud clustering as per characteristics"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DBSCANProcessingEnabler
]

instance KalmanFilterModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Kalman filter for object tracking based on ISO standards"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo KalmanFilterEnabler
]

instance ACCControlLogicModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "ACC control logic per ISO 15622 standard"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ACCControlEnabler
]

instance DBSCANProcessingEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "ROS2 package for DBSCAN point cloud clustering processing"
    DTDFVocab:enables ComputationOffloadingService
]

instance KalmanFilterEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "ROS2 package for Kalman filter object tracking"
    DTDFVocab:enables ComputationOffloadingService
]

instance ACCControlEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "ROS2 package for ACC system execution on Digital Twin"
    DTDFVocab:enables ComputationOffloadingService
]

instance DataMonitoringEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "ROS2 package for real-time 3D visualization and reporting"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService
]

instance RemoteManagementEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "ROS2 package for remote control UI of ACC system"
    DTDFVocab:enables RemoteManagementService
]

instance ActuationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "ROS2 package for motor and steering control actuation"
    DTDFVocab:enables ActuationService
]

instance Jetpack5SDK : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "NVIDIA Jetpack 5.0 SDK for hardware acceleration"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService, ComputationOffloadingService
]

instance ROS2Middleware : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "ROS2 middleware for inter-process communication"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService, ComputationOffloadingService, RemoteManagementService, ActuationService
]

instance Python38 : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python 3.8 for scripting and model implementation"
    DTDFVocab:enables DBSCANProcessingEnabler, KalmanFilterEnabler, ACCControlEnabler
]

instance CPlusPlus : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "C++ for high-performance components"
    DTDFVocab:enables DBSCANProcessingEnabler, KalmanFilterEnabler, ACCControlEnabler
]

instance MATLABSimulink : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MATLAB/Simulink for complex system modeling"
    DTDFVocab:enables ACCControlEnabler
]

instance DataMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time visualization and reporting of vehicle state"
    DTDFVocab:provides RealTime3DVisualization, VehicleStateReporting
]

instance ComputationOffloadingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "ACC system execution on Digital Twin for computation offloading"
    DTDFVocab:provides ACCControlAction
]

instance RemoteManagementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Remote control of ACC via UI for setting desired speed and emergency braking"
    DTDFVocab:provides SetDesiredSpeed, EmergencyBraking
]

instance ActuationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Actuation of motor and steering servo based on control commands"
    DTDFVocab:provides MotorVoltageCommand, SteeringAdjustment
]

instance RealTime3DVisualization : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time 3D visualization of object tracks and driving path for driver transparency"
]

instance VehicleStateReporting : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Reporting of vehicle state parameters for monitoring"
]

instance ACCControlAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automatic ACC control action for lead vehicle following"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance SetDesiredSpeed : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Manual setting of desired speed via remote UI"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance EmergencyBraking : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Emergency braking command triggered via remote UI"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance MotorVoltageCommand : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Voltage command sent to motor for speed control"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance SteeringAdjustment : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Steering angle adjustment command"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance MotorActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Motor controlled by Vedder Electronic Speed Controller for vehicle propulsion"
]

instance SteeringServoActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Steering servo for adjusting vehicle direction"
]

instance PhysicalTwinEntity : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains HokuyoUST10LXLiDAR, IntelDeepsenseD435iDepthCamera, VehicleSpeedSensor, SteeringAngleSensor, MotorActuator, SteeringServoActuator
]

instance DigitalTwinEntity : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains DBSCANModel, KalmanFilterModel, ACCControlLogicModel, DBSCANProcessingEnabler, KalmanFilterEnabler, ACCControlEnabler, DataMonitoringEnabler, RemoteManagementEnabler, ActuationEnabler, DataMonitoringService, ComputationOffloadingService, RemoteManagementService, ActuationService, RealTime3DVisualization, VehicleStateReporting, ACCControlAction, SetDesiredSpeed, EmergencyBraking, MotorVoltageCommand, SteeringAdjustment, VehicleSpeedData, SteeringAngleData, HokuyoPointCloudData, IntelDepthCameraVisualData, ObjectClustersData, ObjectTracksData, VehicleStateData, Jetpack5SDK, ROS2Middleware, Python38, CPlusPlus, MATLABSimulink, ObjectDetectionEnabler
]

instance UserEntity : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains RemoteManagementService
]

instance CrossSystemEntity : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains VehicleStateData, ObjectTracksData
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Control signals including desired speed, emergency braking commands, and ACC enable/disable commands transmitted from the DT's Controlling FE to the vehicle's motor and steering servo actuators."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Real-time operation with ≤100ms end-to-end latency (per 3GPP TS 22.185) and 100ms clock synchronization accuracy between components."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "ISO 23247-based architecture with Physical Twin Entity (on vehicle), Digital Twin Entity (off-vehicle), User Entity (UI), and Cross-System Entity (Data Translation FE), communicating via ROS2 intra-entity and Wi-Fi inter-entity."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "Operational phase (as operated) for the ACC system in a deployed 1/10th-scale autonomous vehicle."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Compliance with ISO 15622 for ACC functionality and adherence to 100ms latency and clock sync requirements for real-time safety-critical operation."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "ROS2 for intra-entity communication; Wi-Fi for inter-entity communication between vehicle and external DT components."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "Physical Twin Entity deployed on vehicle-mounted NVIDIA Jetson hardware; Digital Twin Entity and User Entity hosted externally with data stored in SQL database on external device."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "ISO 23247 reference architecture and ISO 15622 for ACC system implementation."
]

instance security_and_safety_considerations : DTDFVocab:SecuritySafety [
    base:desc "Safety-critical operations addressed via compliance with 3GPP TS 22.185 latency requirements (≤100ms) and 100ms clock synchronization accuracy; no specific cybersecurity measures detailed."
]
